creator: piotr.rybicki@innervision.pl
text:
Edwin Groothuis pisze:
> Maintainer of www/openx,
>
> Please note that PR ports/136378 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136378
>
>   
It's fine to me.
Honestly, i had prepared a similar patch, but since PR system refused to
attach my patch to the PR, i've contacted miwi directly (since he
commits most of my patches).
After a few mails and about a month, i've forgot about it....

Best regards

-- 
Piotr Rybicki
